channel.title: Outreaches on IID Group
channel.description: Recent content in Outreaches on IID Group

item.title: Outreach
item.description: Here we provide a number of events in IID including tutorials, workshops, and services. particularly our goal in the lab is to introduce state-of-the-art techniques in machine learning and optimization to young and motivated students. Tutorials ISIT 2018 tutorial on “Submodularity in Information and Data Science”. Videos: Part One Slides: Part One, Part Two. CVPR 2018 tutorial “Big Data Summarization: Algorithms and Applications” in CVPR 2018. Videos: Part One, Part Two.
